fields.label: Type
fields.rationale: Jinja is the common case: you write HTML with {{ doc.fieldname }} placeholders. Builder is drag-and-drop (raw_printing=0). Server is legacy Python; avoid unless explicitly required.

fields.label: HTML template (for Jinja)
fields.rationale: Required when print_format_type=Jinja. Complete HTML body referencing doc.<field> values. Use {%- -%} for whitespace control. Empty for Builder / Server types.

fields.label: Standard
fields.rationale: No means site-local (DB-only). Yes writes to an app's filesystem and requires a module; use only when shipping the print format in an app.

fields.label: Default for DocType
fields.rationale: Default to 0. Set to 1 only if this should replace the built-in default print format for the DocType.

fields.label: Letter head
fields.rationale: Optional; names a Letter Head whose header / footer wraps this print format. Empty means no letter head.
